ul.li: M5-15/17 (No-Op): Leaders must append a No-Op entry immediately upon election. This ensures that the leader's commitIndex can advance even if no client requests are pending, satisfying the requirement that entries from prior terms cannot be committed by counting replicas alone.

M5-16 (Safety): The Log Matching Property is verified at every AppendEntries RPC. If prevLogIndex and prevLogTerm do not match the follower's log, the follower rejects the append, forcing the leader to decrement nextIndex.
M5-20 (Stress): The StressTestModule uses a deterministic PRNG seed. If a violation (C1-C4) is detected, the exact interleaving of RPC delays and partitions can be replayed for debugging.

g.text: At most one leader per term
Committed entries exist in all future leaders
